announcements.headline: Reply to Clarification Sought
announcements.body: BASF:The Exchange had sought clarification from BASF India Limited with respect to announcement dated 29-Dec-2021, regarding BASF reaches agreement to divest its Production Site in Quincy, Florida to Clariant. On basis of above the Company was required to clarify following:��1. Date on which the agreement for sale has been entered into;2. Brief details of buyers and whether any of the buyers belong to the promoter/ promoter group/group companies. If yes, details thereof.3. Whether the transaction would fall within related party transactions? If yes, whether the same is done at "arm's length";4. Additionally, in case of a slump sale, indicative disclosures provided for amalgamation/merger, shall be disclosed by the listed entity with respect to such slump sale.The response of the Company is attached.

announcements.headline: Other Restructuring
announcements.body: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange about Other Restructuring

announcements.headline: Demerger
announcements.body: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange about receipt of No Objection Certificate from BSE Ltd towards Demerger of Company's Agricultural Solutions Business

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange that further to their Disclosure dated December 16, 2014, the Company has signed the Business Transfer Agreement with Wurth India Private Limited to transfer its import and distribution business of Glasurit, an automotive refinish paint brand in India, with effect from February 01, 2015.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange about approval of the Scheme of Merger by Absorption of BASF Performance Polyamides India Pvt Ltd with BASF India Ltd

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Global Restructuring of BASF's Plant Biotechnology Research

announcements.body: BASF:The Exchange had sought clarification from BASF India Limited with respect to announcement dated 08-Jul-2019, regarding 'BASF to divest stilbene based Optical Brightening Agents business to Archroma India Private Limited.' On basis of above the Company is required to clarify following: 1.
